keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $729.29 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $741.85 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Mixed — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $729.29 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: COIN PUT — enter $8.64–$9.55, target $13.65+, stop $5.46.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +0.72% and SPY +0.11%. Composite sentiment +0 (Mixed). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation, market breadth (a/d). VIX at 15.25 (+0.51%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Technology (+1.20%) is leading while Financials (-2.57%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, NVDA; weakness in COIN, LLY. The desk's highest-conviction setup is COIN (6.6/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
